changelog:
Add account/model/endpoint-aware failover. Generic 429 responses now cool only the failing endpoint and continue through the remaining endpoints before switching accounts. Auto routing remembers the most recently successful endpoint per account and model, while bounded route state and admin diagnostics expose endpoint cooldowns.
新增账号、模型、端点三级故障切换。普通 429 只冷却失败端点，并在切换账号前继续尝试同账号的其他端点；自动路由会记住每个账号模型最近成功的端点。路由状态有容量限制，管理端可查看账号端点冷却数量。
